summary: Frontend-only verification of 4 user requests (hero badge swap, remove 'rhyming picture book' wording, Sea Star card cleanup, admin mobile usability). All four primary changes verified working on the live preview URL. Found one residual occurrence of 'rhyming picture book' in /app/frontend/public/index.html meta description and fixed it directly. One residual copy in backend/seed.py (about_book.intro) which is not rendered on Home but may surface on About page — flagged for main agent.

verified_changes.hero_wave_tag_desktop: PASS - data-testid=hero-wave-tag text='Catch the W.A.V.E. of Excitement' (viewport 1920x1080)
verified_changes.home_no_rhyming_visible: PASS - phrase not in document.body.innerText. Was only in <meta name=description> in public/index.html — fixed by test agent
verified_changes.footer_copy: PASS - footer reads 'A book about being brave on your very first day. Catch the W.A.V.E. of Excitement…'; no 'rhyming picture book' phrase
verified_changes.story_shop_stuffie_removed: PASS - 'Shop my stuffie' absent on /story; 'Hear my voice' and 'Color me' buttons still rendered for each of 13 character cards; no JS console errors
verified_changes.admin_mobile_topbar: PASS - data-testid=admin-mobile-topbar visible at 390x844, desktop sidebar hidden (aside.hidden.lg:flex)
verified_changes.admin_mobile_drawer_open: PASS - tapping admin-mobile-menu-open opens admin-mobile-drawer with 14 nav items (dashboard via admin-nav-admin, products, characters, downloads, download-categories, pages, custom-pages, settings, submissions, mailing-list, campaigns, email-outbox, media, activities)
verified_changes.admin_mobile_drawer_nav: PASS - tapping admin-nav-campaigns navigates to /admin/campaigns AND drawer auto-closes (removed from DOM)
verified_changes.admin_mobile_no_overlap: PASS - content area starts at left:0 on mobile (no lg:ml-64 offset); sidebar fully hidden
verified_changes.admin_desktop_unchanged: PASS - at 1920x800 admin-mobile-topbar hidden, aside.lg:flex sidebar visible; existing layout intact
verified_changes.backend_sanity: Skipped per request. Spot-checked /api/pages/homepage_hero — clean ('Welcome to Stingray Cay', no TEST_ artifacts)

action_items: OPTIONAL: /app/backend/seed.py line 107 still says 'rhyming picture book' in about_book intro. Not visible on Home but is read by about-book page consumers. If main agent wants full site-wide removal, update seed.py and re-seed (or run an admin content update) to replace with 'A book about being brave...' wording. Current DB content for /api/pages/homepage_hero and footer is already clean.

OPTIONAL: dashboard nav item uses data-testid=admin-nav-admin (derived from /admin path split). If main agent prefers admin-nav-dashboard per the original spec, hardcode it in AdminLayout.jsx ITEMS array.
critical_code_review_comments: AdminLayout.jsx: data-testid for dashboard resolves to 'admin-nav-admin' not 'admin-nav-dashboard' because of `to.split('/').pop() || 'dashboard'` (fallback only triggers when pop is empty). Minor naming inconsistency.
Footer.jsx imports api at top AND re-imports inside useEffect dynamic import — redundant; the dynamic import can be removed.
Home.jsx: HERO_IMG hardcoded as fallback — fine, but consider env var for asset CDN consistency.
Story.jsx: 'Hear my voice' button currently has no onClick handler — purely decorative. Confirm whether intended.
updated_files: /app/frontend/public/index.html (replaced 'rhyming picture book' in meta description with 'book')
context_for_next_testing_agent: All four user-requested frontend changes are live and verified. One trivial site-wide-text cleanup remains in backend/seed.py (about_book.intro) — not visible on Home/Footer/Story but advisable to fix for full compliance. Admin mobile drawer flow is solid: hamburger -> drawer (14 items) -> tap nav item -> auto-close + navigate. Test agent had to wait ~4s after login for the success toast to clear before the hamburger became reliably clickable.
